user.title: Set up HALP!
user.description: Select the Home Assistant Person entity HALP! should analyze. HALP! will not modify the Person entity or any trackers.

classify_person_sources_v2.title: Classify assigned location sources
classify_person_sources_v2.description: Below are the sensors assigned to {person_name}. Please use the drop-downs to correct the classification for each sensor below as needed (to GPS, WiFi, BLE, or Other). (Note, the below selections can be changed later in the integration configuration screen.)

error.at_least_one_classified_source_required: At least one assigned tracker must be classified as GPS, WiFi, or BLE.

abort.already_configured: This Person entity is already configured in HALP!.

init.title: Configure HALP!
init.description: Use the drop-downs to change the classification for each assigned tracker.

error.at_least_one_classified_source_required: At least one assigned tracker must be classified as GPS, WiFi, or BLE.
